title: campanula lanceolata var. tenuifolia
intro: Campanula lanceolata var. tenuifolia, also known as the Narrow-leaved Bellflower, is a perennial plant species in the bellflower family (Campanulaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Campanula lanceolata var. tenuifolia can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
